action_line: write_todos("\"todos\":[{\"id\":\"t1\",\"content\":\"Search ClinicalTrials.gov with filters for recruiting U.S. interventional lung cancer trials\",\"status\":\"in_progress\"},{\"id\":\"t2\",\"content\":\"Open at least 15 official ClinicalTrials.gov trial records in separate tabs and verify details\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"id\":\"t3\",\"content\":\"Create CryptPad document with complete trial entries and summary\",\"status\":\"pending\"},{\"id\":\"t4\",\"content\":\"Final verification: 15 complete entries match open tabs\",\"status\":\"pending\"}],\"merge\":false")
response:
"Todo list updated:
- [in_progress] t1: Search ClinicalTrials.gov with filters for recruiting U.S. interventional lung cancer trials
- [pending] t2: Open at least 15 official ClinicalTrials.gov trial records in separate tabs and verify details
- [pending] t3: Create CryptPad document with complete trial entries and summary
- [pending] t4: Final verification: 15 complete entries match open tabs"

"I’ll use the browser for the ClinicalTrials.gov records and keep the official trial tabs open. I’ll use structured data from the trial pages/API only to speed up extraction, then verify each selected record against the official page."

action_line: repl("Listing more direct lung cancer treatment candidates", "const directLungCandidates1 = treatmentCandidates1.filter(d => /lung|NSCLC|SCLC|non-small|small cell/i.test(d.title) && !/solid tumors|selected solid|pan.?tumor|rollover|advanced cancer$/i.test(d.title));\nconsole.log('direct count', directLungCandidates1.length);\nconsole.log(JSON.stringify(directLungCandidates1.slice(0,60).map(d => ({id:d.id,title:d.title,phase:d.phases,tx:d.interventionNames.filter(x=>!/^PROCEDURE/.test(x)&&!/^OTHER/.test(x)&&!/^DIAGNOSTIC/.test(x)).slice(0,8), locCount:d.usRecruitingLocs.length, cities:d.usRecruitingLocs.slice(0,4).map(l=>l.city+', '+l.state)})), null, 2));")
response:
"direct count 247
[
